title: Eternal Is Your Word, O LORD

verses.text: Had not your law been my delight, I would have perished in my strife. Your precepts I will not forget; for thro’ them you preserved my life. LORD, rescue me, for I am yours, and I have sought to know your word.

The wicked lie in wait for me; destruction threatens at their hands, but I, in spite of all their threats, will still consider your commands. Perfection’s limits I have found, but your commandments have no bound.
